name: Jim Caviezel
title: Actor
bio: American actor best known for portraying Jesus Christ in Mel Gibson's 'The Passion of the Christ' (2004) and its sequel. Also starred in 'Person of Interest' and 'Sound of Freedom.'
faith: A devout Catholic who accepted the role of Jesus knowing it could end his Hollywood career. He has spoken at conferences about the cost of following Christ and how his faith guided his acting choices. Starring in 'Sound of Freedom' further demonstrated his commitment to faith-driven projects.
